hero.title: Bigiolo: Holiday home in the heart of Chianti.

about.title: About us
about.text:
Bigiolo a Melazzano is a Country Villa in the heart of Chianti, just minutes from Greve in Chianti, where you will be welcomed by Paolo and Matteo.
During your stay, you can experience the authentic beauty of the Tuscan countryside, nestled among vineyards and olive groves, in a place where time seems to slow down. We manage this farm with passion, producing wine and olive oil that you will have the pleasure of tasting on-site — a genuine experience deeply rooted in the local territory.
If you are looking for a Tuscan holiday that combines the warmth of a family welcome with the privacy of an exclusive residence, our holiday home in Greve in Chianti is the ideal retreat.
Our philosophy is simple: to welcome you not just as guests, but as part of this place, offering you an authentic and unforgettable stay!

house.title: House
house.description: Bigiolo dates back to the Renaissance and has been recently renovated to ensure maximum comfort for our guests while preserving its authentic character. It is nestled among vineyards and olive groves, the very landscape that Renaissance painters once chose as their backdrop — and today, it is all yours. Imagine traveling along a 'strada bianca'— the classic white gravel road—winding through the vineyards of Greve in Chianti, leaving the noise of the world behind you. Here, in the small hamlet of Melazzano, stands Bigiolo: an ancient stone residence where Tuscan authenticity transforms every simple holiday into a return to one’s roots. It is more than just a villa; it is an invitation to rediscover the pleasure of slowness in a place where time seems to have stood still.
house.interiorsDescription:
The independent 200 m² villa has been preserved in full respect of its history, featuring rustic Tuscan-style furnishings that harmonize with the building's original materials.
The fully equipped kitchen — complete with oven, refrigerator, microwave, and dishwasher—welcomes guests at their own pace, from a morning espresso to a dinner prepared with fresh produce from the garden and wine from our vineyard.
The living room, with its fireplace and comfortable sofa, is the heart of the home: a place to gather in the evening, with windows framing the rolling green hills and the peaceful silence of the countryside. The fireplace — though for decorative use only—tells the story of centuries of Tuscan rural life. From the living room, you enter the dining area, featuring a large table and a traditional Tuscan madia (antique sideboard).
The first double bedroom has a private bathroom with a bathtub and shower attachment; the second, also a double, has an en-suite bathroom with a shower and is accessible via a step. The third bedroom, with two single beds, is located in a unique turret, which is accessed via a flight of wooden stairs. The third bathroom, with a modern-style shower and a laundry area with a washing machine, is on the lower floor and is reached via an external staircase.
Air conditioning is available in all bedrooms.
house.exteriorsDescription:
Outside, the property opens onto a large private garden where the Tuscan countryside can be felt in all its intensity.
The swimming pool — 9×5 m, for the exclusive use of guests, open from May 1st to September 30th. The shaded gazebo and outdoor shower complete the area, which is perfect for lunches or aperitifs together.
The covered terrace is the natural setting for al fresco dinners, while the barbecue area invites slow and convivial evening rituals — the kind of evenings you remember for years! The vegetable garden provides guests with seasonal produce: a simple and genuine gesture of hospitality, in the truest Tuscan sense of the word.
The house is reached via a dirt road in excellent condition, and adjacent to the villa, there is a parking area for guests. The presence of the owner — just a few steps away — guarantees discreet assistance and that genuine availability that only those who truly live in the area can offer.

services.title: Services
services.internetDescription: Wi-Fi connection available throughout the property
services.parkingDescription: Park with peace of mind in our private parking area
services.washingDescription: Feel free to use the in-house washing machine

wine.title: Wine
wine.text: The Lands of Melazzano, where the Casanova dè Benci estate is located, have been mentioned in Florentine historical records since the 14th century as areas devoted to the production of olive oil and wine. Situated at 400 meters above sea level in the Chianti hills, this ancient estate benefits from an excellent microclimate and fertile soil in which the Bigiòlo vineyards thrive, consisting predominantly of Sangiovese grapes.
